mapper.sql: id, create_time, update_time, user_id, user_name, user_group, user_group_id, token
mapper.insert: insert into telegram_user (id, create_time, update_time, user_id, user_name, user_group, user_group_id, token) values (#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{userId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{userName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{userGroup,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{userGroupId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{token,jdbcType=VARCHAR})

insert into telegram_user
id,
create_time,
update_time,
user_id,
user_name,
user_group,
user_group_id,
token,
#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{userId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{userName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{userGroup,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{userGroupId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{token,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
mapper.update:
update telegram_user
create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
user_id = #{userId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
user_name = #{userName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
user_group = #{userGroup,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
user_group_id = #{userGroupId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
token = #{token,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update telegram_user set create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, user_id = #{userId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, user_name = #{userName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, user_group = #{userGroup,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, user_group_id = #{userGroupId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, token = #{token,jdbcType=VARCHAR} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
